name: magick-ai/magick-ai-toolbox
description: WordPress AI toolbox plugin for Tavily research, Unsplash image-source candidates, Qdrant vector search, and fixed-flow operator actions.

scripts.package:release: rm -rf build/magick-ai-toolbox build/magick-ai-toolbox.zip && mkdir -p build && rsync -a --delete --exclude-from=.distignore ./ build/magick-ai-toolbox/ && cd build && zip -qr magick-ai-toolbox.zip magick-ai-toolbox
scripts.plugin-check:release: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color plugin check magick-ai-toolbox --format=table --exclude-directories=tests,.git,vendor,node_modules,build,docs --exclude-files=.gitignore,.distignore,AGENTS.md,README.md,composer.json,composer.lock,phpcs.xml,phpcs.xml.dist,phpstan.neon,phpstan.neon.dist
